---
title: "Synthetic Aperature Radar (SAR)"
format:
  html:
    lightbox: true
---

This week focuses on Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR). As mentioned in [week 1](week1.qmd) remote sensors can be either passive or active. SAR is a specific example of aperture which provides its own energy source in the microwave spectrum, allowing it to "see" through clouds and operate at night. 

...well unfortunately I did not manage to finish this section on time:(
